description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for IFC-310 duplicate-detection runtime surface area. The six NEW service/evaluator/worker files and the two new domain events do not yet exist on disk, so their baseline is empty by construction. The modified files (contact.router.ts, account.router.ts, ContactService.ts, AccountService.ts, packages/validators/src/notifications.ts, container.ts, context.ts, ai-worker/src/main.ts) carry their current HEAD coverage into this task; scoped after-capture will measure the delta.
notes: The six net-new artifacts for IFC-310 (duplicate-rule-evaluator, contact/account duplicate-detection services, contact-embed-worker, ContactMergedEvent, CrossTenantOrNotFoundError) do not exist yet; baseline is empty by construction.

Existing modified files (contact.router.ts, account.router.ts, ContactService.ts, AccountService.ts, notifications.ts) retain their current HEAD coverage — changes are additive (branch into new service) plus one hardened merge transaction.
After-implementation coverage will be recorded in artifacts/coverage/IFC-310-after.json and coverage-summary.json, with scoped thresholds enforced at exec Phase 4.5 Gate 9 (Coverage Measurement).
